subject: Offer Received – 1420 Maple Ave
body: Attached is the signed offer for 1420 Maple Ave. Buyer requests a 21-day close. The offer is $485,000 with standard contingencies for inspection and appraisal. Earnest money deposit of $10,000 to be wired within 48 hours.

subject: Schedule showing – 88 Ocean Blvd
body: Hi! I'm very interested in the listing at 88 Ocean Blvd. Can we view the property on Thursday at 2 PM? I'm pre-approved for up to $550k. Looking forward to hearing from you!

subject: Inspection report – 420 Hillside Dr
body: Find attached the inspection summary and termite clearance for Hillside property. Overall the home is in good condition with minor issues noted in the report. Roof has approximately 5-7 years remaining life. HVAC system recently serviced and operating normally.

subject: RE: Counter offer on 789 Pine Street
body: Our client has reviewed your counter offer. They're willing to meet at $425,000 but request the seller include the washer/dryer and refrigerator. This offer expires tomorrow at 5 PM. Please advise ASAP.

subject: Appraisal scheduled – 1420 Maple Ave
body: The appraisal for 1420 Maple Ave has been scheduled for Monday, October 16th at 10:00 AM. The appraiser will need access to all areas of the property including garage, attic, and crawl space. Estimated completion time is 2 hours.

subject: Escrow documents ready – 555 Sunset Drive
body: All escrow documents are prepared and ready for signature. Wire instructions for earnest money deposit are attached. Closing date confirmed for October 25th at 2:00 PM at our title office.

subject: Open House this weekend?
body: Is the property at 88 Ocean Blvd available for viewing? Are you doing an open house this weekend?

subject: Photography for new listing
body: I have availability next Tuesday or Wednesday for the property photos. Please let me know which day works better and the property address. I'll plan for a 2-hour shoot including drone footage.

subject: Monthly Market Report - October 2025
body: View the latest market trends and statistics for your area. Average days on market: 28. Median sale price: $475,000. Click here to unsubscribe from future updates.

subject: HOA disclosure needed – 420 Hillside Dr
body: The buyer's lender is requesting HOA documents and disclosure package for 420 Hillside Drive. Can you obtain these from the HOA? They need them by Friday for loan approval.

subject: URGENT: Inspection contingency expires today
body: This is a reminder that the inspection contingency for 789 Pine Street expires today at 5:00 PM. Please confirm the buyer's decision to proceed or request repairs ASAP.

subject: RE: Is 1420 Maple Ave still available?
body: I noticed the listing on Zillow. Is it still available? I'm interested in scheduling a showing next week. I'm a cash buyer looking to close quickly.
